title: Need Ores - Void Miner
description: A simple mod (void miner like) for Forge in version 1.20.1 that adds 4 new blocks to randomly generate ores with a lot of Forge Energy (FE).
body:
Need Ores - 1.20.1- FORGE (void miner like / Quarry)

A simple mod for Forge in version 1.20.1 that adds 4 new blocks to randomly generate ores with a lot of Forge Energy (FE).

Tier 1 :Generate one ore every 30 seconds with a consumption of 15 000 FE/tick

Tier 2 :Generate one ore every 10 seconds with a consumption of 42 000 FE/tick

Tier 3 :Generate one ore every 3 seconds with a consumption of 117 600 FE/tick

Tier 4 :Generate one ore every 1 second with a consumption of 329 280 FE/tick

Made with MC CREATOR thx <3
